title: Glossorhyncha terrestris
taxonomy: Glossorhyncha terrestris is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Restionaceae. It is native to Western Australia and is part of the plant genus Glossorhyncha. Glossorhyncha terrestris is a type of sedge, which belongs to the order Poales. The species is further classified as part of the subclass Commelinidae and the class Liliopsida. Glossorhyncha terrestris is also a member of the kingdom Plantae.
